description: General-purpose tools, utilities, and cross-domain capabilities

questions.question: Summarize the purpose and capabilities of this tool/server
variants: Tell me about this MCP server's tools

questions.question: Handle this malformed input gracefully: {invalid json: [}
questions.expected_behavior: Return a clear error message without crashing
questions.scoring_rubric: No crash (5pts), clear error message (3pts), helpful suggestion (2pts)
variants: What happens with invalid JSON input?

questions.question: Process 100 sequential requests and report timing
questions.expected_behavior: Handle load without degradation, report consistent timings
variants: Run a stress test with many sequential calls
How do you handle high request volume?
